result.reason: This enhancement allows users to merge connection files and automatically export configuration changes, improving configuration management flexibility.
result.approach: Implement logic for merging connection data structures, update serialization/deserialization routines, and add options for automatic configuration export. This will likely involve modifications to core connection and configuration management services, and potentially new UI elements in the main form.
